landing.title: Pawn Shop Software — NexPawn | Pawn Management System
landing.description: NexPawn is the leading pawn shop software for managing loans, inventory, customers and cash register in one place. Start your free trial today.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — NexPawn
privacy.description: Learn how NexPawn collects, uses and protects your personal information.

terms.title: Terms of Use — NexPawn
terms.description: Read the terms and conditions for using NexPawn pawn shop management software.

hero.subtitle: Control your pawn loans, customers and cash register in one place. No spreadsheets. No errors. No headaches.

benefits.title: Real results for your pawn shop
benefits.subtitle: Built for pawn shops across Latin America and the US. No more spreadsheets, no more manual errors.

items.title: Track every pawn loan without losing money
items.desc: Every pawn loan recorded with amount, interest, and due date. No missed items, no losses. Full control of your pawn business.

items.title: Run your daily cash register without errors
items.desc: Log income, expenses and cash closings in seconds. Say goodbye to spreadsheets and the costly mismatches they cause.

items.title: Never miss a due date again
items.desc: Automatic alerts for expiring loans, renewals, and pending payments. NexPawn works in the background while you serve customers.

items.title: Make decisions with clear data
items.desc: Real-time income, active loans and profitability reports. Know exactly where your pawn shop stands and where it's headed.

items.title: Know which customers drive the most profit
items.desc: Full customer history: past loans, payments, renewals. Identify your best clients and build lasting relationships.

items.title: Access from any device
items.desc: Phone, tablet, or computer. NexPawn runs in your browser with nothing to install. Your pawn shop, always in your pocket.

features.title: Everything your pawn operation needs
features.subtitle: From creating a pawn loan to closing the cash register, NexPawn covers every part of your daily operation.

items.title: Pawn loan management
items.desc: Create, track, and close pawn loans with full item detail, interest, due dates, photos, and 100% traceable history.

items.title: Item inventory
items.desc: Manage all pawned or for-sale items. Fast search, photo storage and valuation to keep your inventory organized.

items.title: Cash register & payments
items.desc: Log payments, deposits and reconciliations. Daily cash closings and instant financial status for your pawn shop.

items.title: Customer records
items.desc: Full customer database with complete history of loans, payments and documents. Fast to query, secure to store.

items.title: Reports & analytics
items.desc: Generate income, sales and overdue loan reports. Export to PDF or Excel with one click. Real data for real decisions.

items.title: Automatic notifications
items.desc: Due date alerts, WhatsApp and email reminders. Keep your team and customers informed without lifting a finger.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits your pawn shop
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No forced contracts. Change plans whenever you need.

plans.desc: Ideal for pawn shops starting their digital journey. Includes essential features for daily control.

features.text: - Loans created today, loans due soon (3 days), and active capital

demo.badge: Fully functional demo · No sign-up needed
demo.subtitle: Access a fully functional pawn shop management demo and see how your business would look organized. The #1 pawn tracking software — experience it today.

footer.tagline: Modern pawn shop software. Fast, secure and easy to use.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At NexPawn we value and respect the privacy of our users. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use and protect information when you use our platform.

blocks.text: We may collect the following types of information:
a. User information:
b. Information generated within the system:

items: Customer data entered by the user (names, ID, contact details)
Cash register, purchase and sales records

blocks.text: Collected information is used to:

items: Enable pawn shop management within the platform

blocks.text: NexPawn acts as a software provider.
The user is responsible for the data entered into the platform, including information about their own customers, and declares having the necessary authorization for its processing.
Information is stored on secure servers and reasonable measures are applied to protect data against unauthorized access, loss or alteration.
However, no system is completely secure, so absolute security cannot be guaranteed.
The user may:
To exercise these rights, you may contact us via the email address indicated below.
NexPawn may use cookies or similar technologies to improve user experience and analyze site usage.
We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be published on this same page.
For questions related to this policy, you may write to:
contact@nexpawn.com
NexPawn is a software platform designed for pawn shop management.
The user agrees to use the service in a legal and appropriate manner.
The user is responsible for:

items: The information recorded on the platform

blocks.text: NexPawn is not responsible for misuse of the system by the user.
The user declares that they have the necessary authorization to store and manage third-party data (customers) within the platform.
NexPawn is provided "as is" and does not guarantee uninterrupted service availability.
Maintenance or updates may be performed that temporarily affect access.

items: Access to the service may be subject to recurring (monthly) payments
Payments are non-refundable unless otherwise stated
NexPawn may modify prices at any time

blocks.text: NexPawn shall not be liable for:

items: Economic losses arising from use of the system
Errors in information entered by the user
Decisions made based on the system's data
